revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:Language/data/iana suppressed scripts]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
new version; no changes but the date;

Trappist the monk moved page [[Module:Language/data/iana suppressed scripts]] to [[Module:Lang/data/iana suppressed scripts]] without leaving a redirect: make subpage(s) of parent module ([[Module:Lang]]);
